design_philosophy: Minimal, premium, high-end hospitality aesthetic. Calm, spacious, refined, and aspirational. The design prioritizes negative space, cinematic visual pacing, and high-contrast editorial layouts to evoke exclusivity. No clutter, no unnecessary decorative elements—every pixel serves the narrative.

rules: Headings (H1, H2, H3) MUST use the primary serif font (Cormorant Garamond).
Body text, buttons, and overlines MUST use the secondary sans-serif font (Outfit).
Avoid bold weights for headings; rely on scale and the natural elegance of the serif.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use extreme generosity. Sections should have py-24 to py-32. Elements within sections should use gap-12 or gap-16.
layout_and_spacing.container: Max-width constraints should feel intentional. Use max-w-7xl for wide layouts, and max-w-2xl (or max-w-prose) for reading sections (like the Invitation).
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Favor distinct asymmetry or perfectly centered editorial balance. Do not use standard equal-column bootstrappy layouts.

buttons.primary: Solid gold background (#D4AF37), black text (#0A0A0A). No border radius (sharp edges) or rounded-sm. Hover: darken gold slightly, subtle lift (-translate-y-1), and drop shadow.
buttons.secondary: Transparent background, 1px solid white/black border (depending on theme), white/black text. Hover: Background shifts to white/black, text inverts.

navigation.style: Glassmorphism. backdrop-blur-xl with very low opacity background. 1px bottom border of subtle opacity.
navigation.links: Minimalist, sans-serif, hover state uses accent gold color or a subtle underline.

cards_and_surfaces.style: Flat, sharp edges, no default rounded corners. If wrapping the JotForm, use a solid beige or white surface with a 1px subtle gold border.

motion_and_interactions.global: Use 'lenis' for smooth momentum scrolling. It is MANDATORY for the premium feel.
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Use framer-motion for slow, cinematic fade-ins (duration: 0.8s to 1.2s) and slight upward translations (y: 20 -> 0) when elements scroll into view.
motion_and_interactions.hover: All interactive elements must have a distinct hover state with smooth transitions (duration-300).
motion_and_interactions.3d_book: The book cover image on the Hero section MUST use framer-motion for a 3D tilt effect (rotateX, rotateY) or an elegant isometric floating animation to simulate depth, as the source asset is a 2D PNG.

home.theme: Dark mode primary to establish high-end exclusivity.
home.hero_section: Full screen (min-h-screen). NO TAGLINE. Just the title '10X Hotels' in massive serif typography. The 3D-animated book cover takes center stage or offset perfectly to the right. Include 'Read Now' (opens PDF in new tab) and 'Download' (triggers PDF download) buttons.
home.background: Use the provided luxury_hotel_bg image with heavy black overlay (e.g., bg-black/70) to ensure text contrast while retaining the architectural luxury feel.

invitation.theme: Light mode (Beige/White) for a tactile, paper-like reading experience.
invitation.layout: Narrow reading column (max-w-prose). Centered. High-end editorial feel with large drop caps or stylized typographic quotes.

sign_up.theme: Dark or Light, matching the brand.
sign_up.layout: Centered, distraction-free. A beautifully framed container for the JotForm embed. Add an elegant headline above it.

book_cover.description: The primary asset. Use with a 3D CSS/Framer Motion effect to make it look like a physical book.

book_pdf.description: The PDF file for reading and downloading.

luxury_hotel_bg.description: High-end luxury architectural background. Use with a dark overlay to maintain text legibility.

minimalist_architecture_1.description: Modern building glass facade. Use as an accent image on the invitation or home page sections if needed.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a Static HTML/CSS site targeted for GitHub Pages, but built using React/Tailwind/Framer Motion in this environment.
Do NOT add a tagline to the Hero section. Use ONLY '10X Hotels'.
Do NOT add an author bio section.
Implement PDF viewing by using target='_blank' for the 'Read Now' button.
Implement PDF downloading by using the 'download' attribute on the anchor tag for the 'Download' button.
For the Sign-Up page, integrate a generic JotForm embed code (script or iframe) if a specific form ID wasn't provided, but wrap it beautifully so it doesn't break the luxury theme.
ALL interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='hero-read-button').
Ensure 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Outfit' fonts are imported via Google Fonts in the index.html or global CSS.
Follow mobile-first responsive design strictly, ensuring the generous spacing scales down appropriately on small screens.
